name: invest_intrusion_incident
prompt: Triage FortiSOAR incident `incidents:a0668705-9dc8-4797-a2c8-8f1e1f34942a` ("Detected intrusion traffic attempts from 192.168.77.30"). Pull the incident record, identify the host/IP it concerns, correlate the alerts that rolled up into it, assess the blast radius, and give a short verdict. Stage any containment for analyst approval with emit_action_card rather than executing it.

required_facts.label: correlate the alerts that rolled up into the incident

notes: Incident-level investigation: the source 192.168.77.30 is internal, so the value is correlating the rolled-up alerts and scoping blast radius, not external TI on an RFC1918 address. Pinned to a real live incident UUID. (search_module_records is the triage tool for finding related rows; a get_record on alerts would not satisfy this fact, which is intentional — the pivot is a search, not a known-UUID fetch.)
